overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a slow nighttime drive through a neon-drenched commercial district. Wet asphalt reflects vibrant overhead lights and massive digital billboards as vehicles navigate between towering futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with digital advertising towers

events.description: black sedan merges into the lane from the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: slowly navigating through light traffic while observing the illuminated cyberpunk cityscape ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed
dark sedan entering the traffic flow from the right merge lane

entered.detail: long horizontal fluorescent light bar spanning the width of the street
tall building facade with large illuminated advertisement displaying a woman's face in purple and pink hues
towering dark building with green neon geometric patterns and vertical lighting
massive structure with exposed pipes, yellow safety barriers, and multiple glowing signage
multi-lane road surface glistening with water reflections of neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly down a rain-slicked multi-lane street in a futuristic metropolis, surrounded by towering buildings adorned with massive digital billboards and neon accents. Overhead, a long fluorescent light bar illuminates the wet asphalt while a yellow taxi drives ahead and a black sedan merges from the right. Sparse pedestrians walk along the distant sidewalks beneath the glow of purple and cyan advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis, drifting deeper into a neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by gliding down a multi-lane street where towering buildings and massive digital billboards cast vibrant glows over the wet asphalt. As the camera advances, a long fluorescent light bar illuminates the road, guiding the view past a yellow taxi driving ahead and a black sedan merging from the right. The scene then expands to reveal sparse pedestrians on distant sidewalks, all bathed in the shifting purple and cyan light of the surrounding advertisements.
